seo.title: Home Page | My Portal
seo.description: Welcome to the home page of our portal.
seo.author: MyPortal Team

powering.title: POWERING WHAT MATTERS MOST
powering.body: At Marafiq, we are more than a utility provider, we are a partner in progress, committed to enabling growth, resilience, and sustainable value for Oman and beyond. We serve a diverse base of strategic clients, ensuring uninterrupted access to electricity, water, steam, and industrial gases, while supporting their focus on innovation and core business priorities.

redefining.title: REDEFINING
redefining.body: Our mission goes beyond operations. We are working to redefine what a modern utility provider can be adaptive, purpose-driven...

efficiency.title: EFFICIENCY
efficiency.body: Since our founding in 2013, Marafiq has become a key contributor to national development by delivering integrated utility ...

services.title: Powering Your Needs
services.description: Explore our range of utility services designed to ensure reliable, efficient, and compliant solutions for every need.

connection.title: Water Service Connection Request
connection.description: Request a new water connection for residential, commercial, or industrial properties.

tanker.title: Tanker Filling License Request
tanker.description: Apply for a license to operate and fill water tankers at approved facilities.

meter.title: Additional Water Meter
meter.description: Request additional utility meters based on increased demand or site requirements.

disconnection.title: Permanent Water Disconnection
disconnection.description: Apply for permanent utility disconnection for completed developments with stable long-term planning.

watch.title: WATCH & DISCOVER
watch.subtitle: Our Latest Videos in one place
watch.description: Discover a wide collection of videos that showcase our latest updates, featured products, and special moments from our brand. In this section, you can watch engaging content that highlights our work, our vision, and everything happening behind the scenes.

newsOne.openPreview: Open media preview from first news card

newsTwo.openPreview: Open media preview from second news card

newsThree.openPreview: Open media preview from third news card

supportInquiry.title: Have a Question? We’re Here to Help
supportInquiry.description: Submit your inquiries easily and get quick, reliable responses from Marafiq. Whether it’s about services, billing, or general information, we’re committed to assisting you promptly.

complaints.title: Report Now
complaints.description: Submit your complaint quickly and easily, each issue is tracked automatically until it’s resolved. We’re committed to handling your concerns promptly.

waterLeakage.title: Water Leakage
waterLeakage.description: Report any leaks for quick repair.

waterQuality.title: Water Quality
waterQuality.description: Submit concerns about water taste, color, or smell.

general.title: General Complaints
general.description: Any other issues related to services.

hero.title: Easy Requests, Fast Processing
